title: Add containers.conf default file for windows and MAC Installs
body:
We want to add this configuration file so that users can descover
how to configure the permanent connection to a remote podman instance.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@rhatdan  Looks like it would make sense to put it in `make podman-remote-release-{platform}.zip`. I haven't looked too much at windows but as long as the file is in the zip for mac, I can change the homebrew formula to install the config wherever
@jwhonce Will this be included in the .msi packages for Windows, or do we need to do more for that to happen?
